amendments.text: [The maximum operating maneuvering speed, VO, must be established as an operating limitation. VO is a selected speed that is not greater than established in Sec. 23.335(c).] 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93.
